title: portulaca rotundifolia
intro: Portulaca rotundifolia, also known as the Indian purslane, is a succulent plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory diseases. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Portulaca rotundifolia are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
